name: Pork with Chestnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork into small bite-size cubes.
2. Place the pork in a frying pan with 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
3. Remove any residue from the pan, cover tightly, and simmer for an hour.
4. In a large pan, place the chestnuts and enough water to cover them. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for an hour.
5. Drain the chestnuts and add them to the pork with the soy sauce, sherry, and dark brown sugar.
6. Cook slowly for an additional 25 minutes.
7. Wash the spinach thoroughly and drain.
8. Place the spinach in a frying pan or wok along with 1 tablespoon of the liquid from the pork and 1 teaspoon of sesame oil.
9. Set heat to high and cook for approximately 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
10. Transfer the spinach onto a serving dish, place the pork on top, and pour the juices over the top.
11. Serve hot.
